decisions.rationale: Valid coverage-artifact gap: files_changed lists PathCard.tsx, PathsGridPanel.tsx, routes.ts, and the coverage JSON but omits PathsFilterRow.tsx even though AC-1 criteria evidence and functional_audit FV-2 cite it as a deliverable. PathsFilterRow.tsx is fully implemented with ai_RNbBHYHZ/ai_RNbBHYHb markers and ENUM-04 tier labels; criteria_audit AC-1 passes at 100%. Omission is audit traceability housekeeping only — it does not reduce coverage_pct, fail any AC, or block downstream PATHS-03 depends_on on grid cards and view-details btn ai_RNbBHYIJ. Expand files_changed on the next coverage pass; no source rewrite required for advance.

IR re-read confirms bTIva is a CustomElement instance wrapper (parent bTIvi) whose reusable root is bTIuS; PathCard correctly marks bTIva on the instance wrapper and DS-02 ProgressBar marks bTIuS/bTIua/bTIuZ on the reusable subtree per DS-02 contract. Nested markers reflect Bubble instance-over-reusable composition, not a missing region. ui_evidence for bTIva passes; AC-2 requires progress via DS-02 ProgressBar (bTIva) + pct bTIvt — satisfied. Downstream PATHS-03 depends on view-details flow, not progress-bar bubble-id placement. Defer optional bubbleId prop on ProgressBar as parity-tooling polish to collapse duplicate subtree selectors.

IR hierarchy places ai_RNbBHYLA as responsive column-state parent of ai_RNbBHYLB grid cells; layout_notes cite ai_RNbBHYLA for mobile breakpoint behavior. Implementation applies md:grid-cols-2 directly on ai_RNbBHYHn (the named ui_ref in PATHS-02 AC-2) and review ui_evidence for ai_RNbBHYHn passes with equivalent responsive columns. ai_RNbBHYLA is not a named ui_ref in PATHS-02 acceptance criteria or ui_refs[] — only layout_notes guidance. Visual layout parity is achieved; missing intermediate marker affects parity tooling selectors only. Defer ai_RNbBHYLA wrapper as optional marker polish.

IR bTJEI copy "You haven't enrolled in any path yet" is correctly used for the zero-enrollment empty state (PathsGridPanel renders bTJEI with PATHS_GRID_EMPTY_TEXT). The tier-filter zero-results branch (enrollments.length > 0 but filteredEnrollments.length === 0) is client-side filter UX with no Bubble IR equivalent — Bubble tier filtering hides rows server-side without a distinct empty-state element. PATHS-02 ACs require bTJEI empty copy and tier DD filtering (AC-2/AC-3), not IR-grounded copy for filtered-not-empty. Defer extracting ad-hoc "No paths match the selected tier." to routes.ts constant or confirming Bubble conditional copy on a later polish pass.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 coverage files_changed completeness for PathsFilterRow.tsx (artifact hygiene); C-2 bTIva/ProgressBar nested bubble-id polish (parity tooling); C-3 ai_RNbBHYLA responsive wrapper marker (not in ui_refs); C-4 tier-filter empty copy (client-side UX, no IR source).
